checks.label: articles.json contains at least one paper
QA fail verdicts are not published
published papers have no QA warnings

agentFlow.responsibility: 发现候选内容，保留来源、主题、时间和热度信号，避免只靠标题判断。
agentFlow.signal: 15 paper candidate(s) from the papers kernel

agentFlow.responsibility: 收集 README、abstract、sourceUrl、paperUrl、benchmark、版本号等证据，让分析有依据。
按岗位相关性、架构价值、实践价值、评估质量、可迁移性和新鲜度排序。
agentFlow.signal: 6 current analysis item(s) available after QA filtering

agentFlow.responsibility: 用教授视角解释该学什么、好在哪里、弱在哪里、如何迁移到自己的工作。
运行结构校验、编码校验和质量门槛，失败时不静默发布。
把通过质量门槛的小批量内容写入前端可读 JSON，保持每日 feed 决策清晰。
把未入选但有复用价值的内容和历史运行记录保存下来，后续用于架构思路和选题复盘。

mustRead.title: Polar: Agentic RL on Any Harness at Scale
mustRead.sourceName: arXiv coding agents and SWE evals
mustRead.reason: High relevance to agent harness, RL for agents, and tool use. Strong interview and build value.

skim.title: MOSS: Self-Evolution through Source-Level Rewriting in Autonomous Agent Systems
skim.reason: Self-evolving agents via source-level rewriting; high relevance for agent systems.

skim.title: MobileExplorer: Accelerating On-Device Inference for Mobile GUI Agents via Online Exploration
skim.reason: Strong relevance to AI agents and multimodal UI, high architecture value and practicality for on-device inference.

skim.title: Governed Evolution of Agent Runtimes through Executable Operational Cognition
skim.reason: Agent runtime governance with high relevance and practical value for AI engineer portfolio.

professorLesson: Polar proposes a proxy-based rollout framework to enable RL training on arbitrary agent harnesses without modification.
goodIdeaToSteal: 核心主张：通过代理模型 API 边界，可以在不修改 harness 的情况下进行 RL 训练。
badIdeaOrRisk: 实验证据强度中等：SWE-Bench 结果基于单次运行，无置信区间；训练数据仅 293 个任务；模型规模仅 4B 参数；仅测试了 GRPO 算法。代码和部分数据已公开，但 HuggingFace 数据集（SkyRL-v0-293-data 和 polar-swegym-trajectories）访问受限或不可用。
transferablePattern: 摘要中给出了四个 harness 上的具体提升：Codex +22.6, Claude Code +4.8, Qwen Code +0.6, Pi +6.2，但未提供置信区间或多次运行统计。
futureWorkApplication: 论文指出 per_request 策略结合结果奖励广播可能导致奖励破坏，但不在本文范围内；未来工作包括会话归一化和 PRM 风格信用分配。另外，实验仅针对软件工程任务，其他类型 agent 未验证。
architectureTakeaway: 摘要中给出了四个 harness 上的具体提升：Codex +22.6, Claude Code +4.8, Qwen Code +0.6, Pi +6.2，但未提供置信区间或多次运行统计。
projectIdea: Build a grounded checklist from Polar: Agentic RL on Any Harness at Scale and test it against one agent workflow.
